name: custom-wysiwyg-editor
description: A framework-agnostic WYSIWYG editor with first-class React/Next.js bindings and Markdown/HTML export

scripts.build: npm run build -w @custom-wysiwyg/core && npm run build -w @custom-wysiwyg/ui && npm run build -w @custom-wysiwyg/export-html && npm run build -w @custom-wysiwyg/export-markdown && npm run build -w @custom-wysiwyg/import-markdown && npm run build -w @custom-wysiwyg/agent-adapter && npm run build -w @custom-wysiwyg/react
